title: Training Season
why_this_song: Training Season by Dua Lipa (2024) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "someone" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "someone" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "cause" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "cause" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Or just the poison that I'm drawn to?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Training Season" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Training Season"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Training Season", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Training Season", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: "Training Season" was released in 2024. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Training Season" foi lançada em 2024. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Dua Lipa one question about "Training Season", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Dua Lipa sobre "Training Season", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Training Season" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Training Season" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?
